creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
The port www/p5-RTx-Statistics is not compatible with RT 3.6, and I no longer
use it, so please remove me as maintainer of the port, and/or mark it
deprecated and schedule for removal.  The functionality is rolled into RT 3.6,
so it is only of use to people running the older versions of RT.

Fix: 

set MAINTAINER=ports@freebsd.org at minimum.
